transcript: #Person1#: Aaj mind matters par, main Dr. Ann Winters se baat kar raha hoon, jo human memory ki expert hain.. Ann, program mein aapka swagat hai. Ab, mujhe lagta hai pehla sawaal jo sab poochhenge woh yeh hai: human memory kya hai? #Person2#: Well, jaise bahut saare aasaan sawaalon ka jawab itna simple nahi hota. Basicly, human memory ek compartment hai logon ke dimaag mein jahan woh images store karte hain, bilkul waise jaise computer ka hard disc drive. Aur jaise hard disc drive, hamari yaadein bhi infections se ya accidents se wipe out ho sakti hain. Lekin jab hum sochte hain ki hum apni yaadon ko train karke expand aur behtar bana sakte hain, toh yeh comparison toot jaata hai kyunki computers abhi tak yeh manage nahi kar sakte. #Person1#: Jab aap kehte hain ki memory infected ho sakti hai, kya aap disease se keh rahe hain? #Person2#: Haan. Misal ke taur par, log jo physiological disease jaise Alzheimer se suffer karte hain: woh cheezein bhool jaate hain jo past mein hui thi. Aur woh simple tasks jaise apni shoelaces bandhna bhi bhool jaate hain. Achhi baat yeh hai ki brain exercises se dimaag ko jawaan rakha ja sakta hai. Research ne dikhaya hai ki jo log achhi education aur mentally active jobs rakhte hain unka disease develop hone ka risk kam hota hai. #Person1#: Aur koi apne dimaag ko exercise kaise kar sakta hai? Kya sirf zyada sochne se? #Person2#: Ek tarike se, haan. Lekin aap apni memory ka istemal karne ki practice bhi kar sakte hain jo sirf aapke dimaag ko exercise nahi karta balki aapki cheezein yaad rakhne ki ability ko bhi improve karta hai. Dukh ki baat yeh hai ki aaj kal ke bahut saare devices aise design kiye gaye hain ki hum cheezein bhool na jaayein, jo hamare dimaag ko zyada idle bana sakta hai aur hamari yaadon ko kamzor kar sakta hai. #Person1#: Kya aap humein kuch examples de sakte hain ki kaise hum apni yaadon ko exercise kar sakte hain? #Person2#: Sure, ek bahut simple technique hai, halankeh yeh kuch logon ke liye zyada behtar kaam karti hai. Jab aap kuch yaad rakhna chahte hain, toh us cheez ka sochiye jo aapko us cheez ki yaad dilata hai. Agar mujhe history ka ek date yaad rakhna hai, maan lijiye, 1066, jo Battle of Hastings ka date hai. Main soch sakta hoon ki woh battle mujhe bottle ki yaad dilata hai, toh main ek bottle ka sochta hoon jiske label par number 1066 likha hai. Aur main bas woh bottle apne dimaag mein sochta hoon.
summary: #Person1# Dr. Ann Winters se interview karte hain, jo human memory ki expert hain. Ann pehle yeh samjhati hain ki human memory logon ke dimaag mein images store karne ka compartment hai. Woh kehti hain ki memory diseases ya accidents se infected ho sakti hai aur brain exercise se dimaag ko jawaan rakha ja sakta hai. Phir woh kuch examples deti hain ki kaise yaadon ko exercise kiya ja sakta hai.

#Person2#: Perfect! Main yeh le loonga!

#Person1#: Tumhare sheher mein mausam kaisa hota hai?

#Person1#: Bahar aur patjhad kaisa hota hai?  
#Person2#: Mujhe bahar pasand hai kyunki phool khilte hain aur pedon par patte aate hain. Bahar ka mausam bahut badalta hai - kabhi thanda, kabhi garam. #Person1#: Achha, main southern hemisphere mein rehta hoon, toh hamara garmi ka mausam tumhare sardi ke mausam ke barabar hai, aur vice versa. Har mausam mein thodi baarish hoti hai, par zyada sardi mein hoti hai. Sardi mein kabhi kabhi thand hoti hai, par hamari sardiyan aksar kaafi naram hoti hain. Garmi garam hoti hai, par itni garmi nahi. Bahar aur patjhad dono bahut chhote hote hain - kabhi kabhi sirf kuch hafton ke liye. Tab mausam bahut badalta hai - bilkul tumhare sheher ki bahar ki tarah.  
#Person2#: Kya tum aksar garmi ki chutti par jaate ho?  
#Person1#: Nahi, main nahi jaata. Main sardi ki chutti par jaata hoon. Main kahin garam jagah par jaata hoon.  
#Person2#: Main aksar bahar ya patjhad mein chutti par jaata hoon. Main koshish karta hoon ki kahin aise jagah jaoon jahan mausam mere sheher se zyada reliable ho.

Lekin, mera favorite subject math tha, aur jo results mujhe math paper mein mile woh kaafi reasonable the. #Person1#: Yeh sahi hai. Ab, kya aap mujhe bata sakte hain kyun aapko lagta hai ki yeh subjects aapko is job mein madad karenge? #Person2#: Well, madam, mujhe samajh aata hai ki aap computers manufacture karte hain, software prepare karte hain, aur clients ko unhe kaise use karna hai is par advice dete hain. Kya yeh sahi hai? #Person1#: Haan, yeh sahi hai. #Person2#: Aur mujhe bataya gaya hai ki computers ke saath kaam karne ke liye ek logical mind chahiye hota hai na ki mathematics mein great skills. Yeh khas taur par true hai, mujhe lagta hai, jab programming likhne ki baat aati hai. Toh mujhe lagta hai ki mere results dikhate hain ki mere paas logic aur mathematics dono mein kuch ability hai. #Person1#: Toh, aap computers ke liye material likhna chahenge, kya? #Person2#: Haan, madam. Yeh mujhe computers ke baare mein sabse zyada interest deta hai - programs likhna, lekin mujhe lagta hai ki computer industry khud bahut zyada expand ho rahi hai. Mujhe yakin hai ki industry mein career prospects bahut achhe honge chahe main kis type ki job mein jaun. #Person1#: Main samajh gayi, well, thank you. Mujhe hamari baat karke accha laga. Hum aapko likhenge. #Person2#: Thank you, madam. Good morning.
summary: Job interview ke dauran, Mr. Johnson #Person1# ko apne schoolwork, unki abilities jo unhe job mein madad karengi, aur computer industry mein unke interests ke baare mein batate hain.
